reason: Successfully executed test to verify agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Application loaded successfully with sidebar showing multiple agents including "QA-20260319-004012-3vdv" in idle state
Clicked on "QA-20260319-004012-3vdv" agent in sidebar — Successfully navigated to agent's landing page
Verified agent status — Agent status showed "idle" which meets the requirement (idle or running)
Typed and sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message sent successfully; agent status changed to "working" and message appeared in chat view
Waited for account access request card — Card appeared requesting GitHub account access
Selected GitHub checkbox and clicked "Grant Access" button — GitHub account access was successfully granted; agent resumed processing with status "working"
Waited for agent response — Agent completed processing in 41 seconds (well within 4-minute limit) and returned to "idle" status

Verified response includes GitHub username and took screenshot — Final response clearly shows: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Screenshot captured showing complete chat history with username prominently displayed
